elements.title: a Chicago church
elements.contents: ... that a pastor of a Chicago church (pictured) resigned after it was discovered that he had previously been defrocked in 1915 for having multiple wives?

elements.title: Pyapon Taung Shinma
elements.contents: ... that local custom at Pyapon Mountain dictates that all jewelry must be hidden from view to avoid offending Pyapon Taung Shinma?

elements.title: Dai Dai Ames
elements.contents: ... that Dai Dai Ames and Justin Pippen joined the Cal Bears after it replaced nearly all of its players in 2025?

elements.title: Aciculolenus palmeri
elements.contents: ... that some of the largest specimens of Aciculolenus palmeri were around 9 millimeters long?

elements.title: Wei Shujun
elements.contents: ... that the films of Wei Shujun often meditate on the process of making films for the Chinese cinema industry?

elements.title: Galilean fortress
elements.contents: ... that a Galilean fortress once thought to be built by Akko-Ptolemais against the Hasmoneans, was actually built by the Hasmoneans to monitor Akko?

elements.title: Grete Hermann
elements.contents: ... that mathematician Grete Hermann wrote political philosophy articles for Der Funke and Sozialistische Warte under various pseudonyms during the German resistance to Nazism?

elements.title: Unsanctioned
elements.contents: ... that the Unsanctioned set of Magic: The Gathering cards are illegal in the game's tournaments due to their satirical nature?

elements.title: Belle Hassan
elements.contents: ... that Belle Hassan once milked goats on television?
